name: monster_family

families.description: Sinh vat tu nhien cua cac vung dong co va rung ram.
Nhung thu da chet nhung khong chiu nam yen.
Hien than cua suc manh nguyen to thuan khiet.
families.special_rule: element_weakness = opposite in ElementChart; element_resistance = own element

families.description: May moc va cong trinh khong co linh hon.
Sinh vat tu cac chieu khong gian toi tam.
Ke thu co ly tri va chien thuat.

slayer_bonus_note: Slayer bonus inside Trait+Rune 6% budget — not additive on top
cc_immune_note: CC immunity is per-named-mob; regular mobs of family can be CCed unless specified
